data.title: SSL/TLS Encryption
data.description: Ensures secure data transmission between the server and clients.
data.technical_spec: Employs strong encryption protocols like TLS 1.3 and regular certificate updates.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.technical_spec: Uses robust network defenses and Google Cloud Armor for traffic analysis.

data.title: Multi-Factor Authentication
data.description: Adds an extra layer of security for user accounts.
data.technical_spec: Supports two-factor authentication (2FA) via apps, SMS, and secure keys.

data.title: Threat Detection Systems
data.description: Advanced monitoring to identify and prevent potential threats.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes machine learning algorithms for real-time threat analytics.

data.title: Zero Trust Architecture
data.description: Network security model that requires strict identity verification.
data.technical_spec: Incorporates BeyondCorp framework for context-aware access controls.
